mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.Name, a.mark , a.IsDefault FROM sys_role a INNER JOIN sys_user_role b ON a.Id = b.RoleId WHERE a.IsDeleted = false AND b.UserId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT a.* FROM sys_permissions a LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission b ON b.permissionid = a.Id WHERE b.RoleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND a.IsDeleted = false AND a.status = 1
